text: Stepping into this dim, angular hallway, I immediately feel a sense of anticipation mixed with mild uncertainty. The silence is punctuated only by the hum of fluorescent lights. The glass door ahead suggests boundaries—physical and perhaps conceptual—between spaces of action and spaces of reflection. I am alert, aware that I traverse the threshold into somewhere significant, a place that may challenge or expand my understanding. There is both an unease and a quiet thrill in the unknown that lies just beyond.
